description: Incomplete if-else in combinational always block infers latch on out
fix_patch: Replace if-else with case statement and add default branch

buggy_snippet:
assign net_reset_sync = rst_gen_out;
assign net_reset_sync = por_cell_rst;
description: Two concurrent assign statements drive the same net causing contention
fix_patch: Merge drivers using OR gate into single assign statement

description: Deep combinational path in single-cycle adder causes WNS violation
fix_patch: Pipeline the adder across two clock cycles using intermediate registers

buggy_snippet:
assign grant = req & ~busy;
assign busy  = grant & processing;
fix_patch: Register the grant signal to break the combinational loop

description: Direct sampling of slow-domain signal in fast-domain without synchronizer
fix_patch: Insert 2-flop synchronizer chain between clock domains

description: Input port clk_en declared but never used in logic
fix_patch: Use clk_en as clock enable condition in always block
